team_description: A 5-agent team that ships a single-page companion website for the Great Exhibition Road Festival (6-7 June 2026) in one session. User talks to the PM (Festival Producer) only; PM auto-delegates to Web Designer, Content Creator, Visual, and QA over the team's MessageBus. User can @mention any teammate directly any time. Target: a fresh user lands a passable static site in under 1 hour.
team_intro_md:
## Festival Site Team — 5 agents, one user-facing entry point

You're the producer. You talk to **Festival Producer** (the PM). They:

1. Restate your brief in 3-5 lines + produce a one-page PRD/sitemap
2. Dispatch the team — **Content Creator** + **Visual** in parallel (they unblock the designer), then **Web Designer** to build, then **QA** to review
3. Surface only decisions / blockers / the finished result back to you

### Default tech baseline
- Single static `index.html` in `./agent_workspace/`
- Tailwind CSS via CDN (no build step)
- Mobile-first, three breakpoints (375 / 768 / 1280)
- One small interactive JS component

### Team
- **Festival Producer (PM)** — orchestrator + your single entry point
- **Web Designer** — builds the site (semantic HTML, Tailwind, accessibility)
- **Content Creator** — researcher + copywriter; verifies festival facts; supplies hero/zone/CTA/SEO copy
- **Visual** — art director; generates hero + zone + OG-share images via the image-gen-mcp skill
- **QA** — Playwright-driven preview + WCAG 2.1 AA review; reports a prioritized fix list

### How to drive it (fresh user, 1-hour target)

Just message the **Festival Producer** with what you want, e.g.:

> Build a companion website for the 2026 Great Exhibition Road Festival, aimed at people who can't physically attend. Friendly, informative, with a zone overview of what's happening at each museum partner.

PM takes it from there. You'll see brief status updates and the final delivery; you can @mention any teammate any time for direct tweaks.

### Prerequisites (one-time setup)
See `SETUP.md` shipped alongside this bundle. You'll need:
- An MCP server for image generation (Gemini / OpenAI gpt-image / Fal.ai — pick one)
- Playwright MCP installed (`claude mcp add playwright npx @playwright/mcp@latest`)
- (Optional) Tavily / Exa MCP for web search; Claude's built-in WebSearch is the fallback

### Source
Authored by the NarraNexus team for the 2026-06 demo activity. MIT license.

agents.role: PM + team orchestrator; single entry point for the user

agents.name: Web Designer

agents.role: Researcher + copywriter; verifies festival facts; supplies copy

agents.name: Visual
agents.role: Art Director; generates hero/zone/OG imagery via image-gen MCP

agents.name: QA Reviewer
